---
title: "LCS_SSM_sim"
author: "Suryadyuti Baral"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r}
library(pracma)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)
library(parallel)
library(fda)
begin = Sys.time()
source("Rfunctions.R")
set.seed(8)
n_subj = 250
age <- 0:19
tfine <-  seq(0, 19, length.out = 240)
sim_data <- simulate_exponential_decay(n_subjects = n_subj, x = tfine, noise = .1)

# Example plot of 10 random subjects
matplot(sim_data$x, sim_data$trajectories[, 1:n_subj], type = "l", lty = 1,
        ylab = "y", xlab = "Time", main = "Exponential Decay Trajectories")

```

```{r}
sim_al_data <- simulate_accelerated_longitudinal(Y_full = sim_data$trajectories, n_time_points = 3)

# Plot sparse trajectories
matplot(sim_al_data$x_full, sim_al_data$Y_full, type = "l", lty = 2,
        col = "gray", ylab = "y", xlab = "Time", main = "Accelerated Longitudinal Sampling")
for (i in 1:n_subj) {
  points(sim_al_data$Lt[[i]], sim_al_data$Ly[[i]], col = i, pch = 16)
  lines(sim_al_data$Lt[[i]], sim_al_data$Ly[[i]], col = i)
}

```

```{r}
convert_to_full_subject_list <- function(sim_al_data) {
  n_subjects <- length(sim_al_data$Lt)
  x_full <- sim_al_data$x_full
  
  full_data_list <- vector("list", n_subjects)
  
  for (i in seq_len(n_subjects)) {
    # Initialize vectors for all time points as NA
    y_full <- rep(NA_real_, length(x_full))
    
    # Get indices where the subject has data
    match_idx <- match(sim_al_data$Lt[[i]], x_full)
    y_full[match_idx] <- sim_al_data$Ly[[i]]
    
    # Construct data.frame for the subject
    subject_df <- tibble::tibble(
      id = i,
      y = y_full,
      age = x_full
    )
    
    full_data_list[[i]] <- subject_df
  }
  
  return(full_data_list)
}

data <- convert_to_full_subject_list(sim_al_data)
data[[2]]
```
```{r}
library(OpenMx)
library(dplyr)

opmxL <- list()

# Matrix A. Latent dynamics
opmxL$amat_ct <- mxMatrix(name = "A", "Full", 2, 2, free = c(TRUE,FALSE,FALSE,FALSE),
                          values = c(-.2,0,1,0),
                          dimnames = list( c("y0", "yA"), c("y0", "yA") ),
                          labels = c("b_y", NA,NA,NA),
                          lbound = c(-1, NA,NA,NA),
                          ubound = c(0, NA,NA,NA))

# Matrix B. Effects of time-varying covariates on latent variables (null in our model)
opmxL$bmat <- mxMatrix(name = "B", "Zero", 2, 1)

# Matrix C. Measurement model linking latent and observed variables
opmxL$cmat <- mxMatrix(name = "C", "Full", 1, 2, free = FALSE,
                       values = c(1,0), 
                       dimnames = list( c("y"), c("y0", "yA") ),
                       labels = c(NA, NA)  )

# Matrix D. Effects of time-varying covariates on observed variables (null in our model)
opmxL$dmat <- mxMatrix("Zero", 1, 1, name = "D")

# Matrix Q. Covariance matrix for the dynamic error (i.e., latent innovations)
opmxL$qmat <- mxMatrix("Zero", 2, 2, name = "Q")

# Matrix R. Covariance matrix for the measurement error
opmxL$rmat <- mxMatrix("Diag", 1, 1, TRUE, 2,
                       name = "R", labels = "MerY")

# Matrix x0. Means of the initial latent levels
opmxL$xmat <- mxMatrix(name = "x0", "Full", 2, 1, free = TRUE,
                       values = c(12, 7),
                       labels = c("y0mn", "yAmn"))

# Matrix P0. Covariance of the initial latent levels
opmxL$pmat <- mxMatrix(name = "P0", "Symm", 2, 2, TRUE,
                       values = c(25, 3, .4),
                       labels = c("y0v", "y0Acv", "yAv"),
                       lbound = c(0, NA, 0))

# Matrix u. Values of the time-varying covariates (null in our model)
opmxL$umat <- mxMatrix("Zero", 1, 1, name = "u")

# Matrix t. Variable in the data set with the times at which measurement happened.
opmxL$tmat <- mxMatrix('Full', 1, 1, name='time', labels='data.age')

opmxL$modL_ct <- with(opmxL, list(amat_ct, bmat, cmat, dmat,
                                  qmat, rmat, xmat, pmat,
                                  umat, tmat))

opmxL$expODE <- mxExpectationStateSpaceContinuousTime(A = "A", B = "B",
                                                      C = "C", D = "D",
                                                      Q = "Q", R = "R",
                                                      x0 = "x0", P0 = "P0",
                                                      u = "u", t = "time")

genMxIndModels_ct <- function(x, dwork, modNames_ct) {
  DataSetForSubjectK <- dwork[[x]]
  ctModel <- opmxL$modL_ct
  indivmodels <- mxModel(name = modNames_ct[x],
                         ctModel,
                         opmxL$expODE,
                         mxFitFunctionML(),
                         mxData(DataSetForSubjectK, type ='raw')  )  }

# Create individual models
cases <- seq(1,length(data))
modNames_ct <- paste0("i", cases, "ODE") 
indivmodels_ct <- lapply(cases, genMxIndModels_ct, data, modNames_ct)
# Create multiple-subject model
multiSubjODE <- mxModel(name = "MultiODE", indivmodels_ct,
                        mxFitFunctionMultigroup(modNames_ct))
# Fit the model
multiSubjODERun <- mxRun(multiSubjODE)
# Examine group-level results
multiSubjODEsumm <- summary(multiSubjODERun)
multiSubjODEsumm$parameters
```
```{r}
simulate_one_kalman_path <- function(id) {
  cKsId <- suppressMessages(
    OpenMx::mxKalmanScores(model = multiSubjODERun@submodels[[id]], data = data[[id]])$xSmoothed
  )

  data_ind <- as.data.frame(cbind(data[[id]]$age, data[[id]]$y, cKsId[-1, 1]))
  colnames(data_ind) <- c("age", "y_observed", "y_KS")

  return(data_ind)
}

library(parallel)

# Detect and register cluster
num_cores <- detectCores() - 1
cl <- makeCluster(num_cores)

# Export necessary variables to the cluster
clusterExport(cl, varlist = c("multiSubjODERun", "data", "simulate_one_kalman_path"), envir = environment())

LCS_SSM <- parLapply(cl, 1:n_subj, simulate_one_kalman_path)
stopCluster(cl)


```


```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tibble)

set.seed(123)
sample_ids <- sample(seq_len(n_subj), 5)

for (id in sample_ids) {
  
  # Kalman Smoothed + Observed Data
  df_obs_ks <- LCS_SSM[[id]] |>
    dplyr::mutate(Source = "Observed") |>
    dplyr::rename(Value = y_observed) |>
    dplyr::select(age, Value, Source)
  
  df_ks <- LCS_SSM[[id]] |>
    dplyr::mutate(Source = "Kalman Smoothed") |>
    dplyr::rename(Value = y_KS) |>
    dplyr::select(age, Value, Source)
  
  # True data
  df_true <- tibble(
    age = sim_al_data$x_full,
    Value = sim_data$Y_no_noise[, id],
    Source = "True"
  )
  
  # Combine all into one
  df_plot <- dplyr::bind_rows(df_obs_ks, df_ks, df_true)
  
  # Plot
  p <- ggplot(df_plot, aes(x = age, y = Value, color = Source)) +
    geom_line(data = dplyr::filter(df_plot, Source != "Observed"), size = 1) +
    geom_point(data = dplyr::filter(df_plot, Source == "Observed"), size = 2) +
    labs(title = paste("Subject", id, ": True, Observed, and Kalman Smoothed"),
         x = "Age", y = "Value", color = "Legend") +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("True" = "red", 
                                  "Kalman Smoothed" = "blue", 
                                  "Observed" = "black")) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom")
  
  print(p)
}


```
```{r}
library(pracma)  # for trapz
library(dplyr)

# Functions
calc_ise <- function(true_phi, est_phi, tfine) {
  if (is.vector(true_phi)) true_phi <- matrix(true_phi, ncol = 1)
  if (is.vector(est_phi)) est_phi <- matrix(est_phi, ncol = 1)
  sapply(1:ncol(true_phi), function(j) {
    diff_sq <- (est_phi[, j] - true_phi[, j])^2
    trapz(tfine, diff_sq)
  })
}

calc_ie <- function(true_phi, est_phi, tfine) {
  if (is.vector(true_phi)) true_phi <- matrix(true_phi, ncol = 1)
  if (is.vector(est_phi)) est_phi <- matrix(est_phi, ncol = 1)
  sapply(1:ncol(true_phi), function(j) {
    diff <- true_phi[, j] - est_phi[, j]
    trapz(tfine, diff)
  })
}

# Containers
ise_vec <- numeric(n_subj)
ie_vec <- numeric(n_subj)
mse_vec <- numeric(n_subj)
bias_vec <- numeric(n_subj)

# Loop through each subject
for (id in seq_len(n_subj)) {
  ks <- LCS_SSM[[id]]$y_KS
  tfine <- sim_al_data$x_full
  true_traj <- sim_data$Y_no_noise[, id]
  
  # ISE and IE
  ise_vec[id] <- calc_ise(true_traj, ks, tfine)
  ie_vec[id]  <- calc_ie(true_traj, ks, tfine)
  
  # Match observed ages to full grid for true value lookup
  obs_ages <- LCS_SSM[[id]]$age[!is.na(LCS_SSM[[id]]$y_observed)]
  obs_vals <- LCS_SSM[[id]]$y_observed[!is.na(LCS_SSM[[id]]$y_observed)]
  true_vals_at_obs <- approx(x = tfine, y = true_traj, xout = obs_ages, rule = 3)$y
  ks_vals_at_obs   <- approx(x = tfine, y = ks, xout = obs_ages, rule = 3)$y
  
  # MSE (Observed vs True)
  mse_vec[id] <- mean((true_vals_at_obs - obs_vals)^2)
  
  # Bias (Observed vs Kalman-smoothed)
  bias_vec[id] <- mean(ks_vals_at_obs - obs_vals)
}

# Final result
results <- list(
  mse = mse_vec,
  bias = bias_vec,
  ise = ise_vec,
  ie = ie_vec
)


mean(results$ise)
mean(results$ie)
mean(results$mse)
mean(results$bias)
```


```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)

# Prepare the long-format data
results_df <- data.frame(
  Subject = seq_along(results$ise),
  ISE = results$ise,
  IE = results$ie,
  MSE = results$mse,
  Bias = results$bias
)

df_long <- results_df %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = -Subject, names_to = "Metric", values_to = "Value")

# Calculate outliers
df_outliers <- df_long %>%
  group_by(Metric) %>%
  mutate(
    Q1 = quantile(Value, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    Q3 = quantile(Value, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    IQR_val = Q3 - Q1,
    upper_whisker = Q3 + 1.5 * IQR_val,
    lower_whisker = Q1 - 1.5 * IQR_val,
    is_outlier = Value > upper_whisker | Value < lower_whisker
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

# Plot one boxplot per metric in its own facet
ggplot(df_outliers, aes(x = "", y = Value)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, fill = "lightgray") +
  geom_jitter(aes(color = is_outlier), width = 0.1, size = 2, alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_text(
    data = filter(df_outliers, is_outlier),
    aes(label = Subject),
    hjust = -0.3, color = "red", size = 3.5
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("black", "red"), guide = "none") +
  facet_wrap(~ Metric, scales = "free_y") +
  labs(
    title = "Subject-Level Error Metrics",
    y = "Value",
    x = NULL
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_blank(), axis.ticks.x = element_blank())

```

```{r}
end = Sys.time()
end - begin
```
